title: The genomics of schizophrenia: update and implications.
author: Giusti-Rodriguez P Sullivan PF
content: S-EPMC3809776 PMC3809776 The genomics of schizophrenia: update and implications. Schizophrenia is strongly familial yet rarely (if ever) exhibits classical Mendelian inheritance patterns. The advent of large-scale genotyping and sequencing projects has yielded large data sets with higher
